series_metadata.series_description: Official minutes, meeting tapes, orders and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Saved executed (signed) Board minutes are scanned into OCC''s data system and retained no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Paper copy of executed (signed) Board minutes retained . Purge will take place at following years end and destroyed. State Archives will review minutes before disposal
